titleStmt.title: SII 24.216: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 216. (A.R. No. 48 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records the sale of land by Gōmaḍattu Nārāyaṇa Bhaṭṭa and his brother to Kāliṅgarāyar who in turn gave it over to the 32 bhaṭṭas of the agaram (Kaliyugarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam). The details of date viz. 10th year, Kuṁbha ba. 13, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam are the same as in No. 209. The land is stated to have been sold in order to form part of the pathway to Kāvēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu kumpa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu pācciṟ kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu brahmadeyam perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam śrīvikkirama coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu komaṭattu nārāyaṇa paṭṭarum Eṉ tampi vaiṇateva paṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom puṉcey vilaiRead nilavilaipramāṇam
nila pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . teṉkarai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu naṭuvil kūṟṟil śrīparāntakanallūr kaṭṭikkuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭutta puṉcey viḷainilamāvaṉa Ivvūrt tiruvaraṅkavatikkuk kiḻakku vikkirama coḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum teṟkum mutaṟkaṇṇāṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu koṟu koṭṭit tevapaṭṭaṉutāṉa kamukaṭinilattu vaḻiyāka viṭṭa varappiṉāl kuḻiyum Itaṉ teṟku Eṉṉutāṉa
kamukaṭi nilattuviṭṭa varappiṉāl kuḻiyum kuṟu puṉ(ñ)cey Uḷḷiṭṭa vaiyiṟṟiṉāl kuḻi Irupattāṟum Ikkuḻi Irupattāṟum kāverikkarai yuṟa vaḻiyāka viṭukaiyil Ivvaḻiyiṉāl muṉpu taṉta varappu nikki kuḻi Irupattāṟum Ivvūril maṇṇukku miṇṭarāṉa kaṇṭiyatevar kāṇiyāṉa kamukaṭi nilattilum puṉ(ñ)cey nilattilum Eṉṉutāṉa kamukaṭi nilattuk kiḻ talaiyil Ivvācalaṇaiya Ivarutāṉa Ulakuḷāṉuṭaṉ viṭṭu Ivarutāṉa kamukaṭi nilattilum puṉ(ñ)cey nilattilum viṭuvittuk koṇṭa kuḻi Eṇpatu Ikkuḻi Eṇpatum Āka viḷainilam
kuḻi nūṟṟu Āṟekālum Eṉṉutāṉa kommaṭittiṭal puṉce kku Añcaraiyum pattaṅki tiruvaraṅkamāḷipaṭṭar meṟpaṭi puṉcey kuḻi Āṟaraiyum muṟicceṭṭur tecaratarāma paṭṭar merppaṭip puṉcey kuḻi muṉṟaraiyum Ākak kuḻi patiṉaiñcaraiyum viḷainilam kuḻi nūṟṟu Āṟekālukku muliyamāka niccayitta paṇam Irupatu Ippaṇamirupatukkum Ippuṉcey kuḻi patiṉaiñcaraiyum viḷainilam vaḻikkum vāykkālukkum Akarattil vāstuvukku viṟṟakuḻi nūṟṟāṟekālume viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Araiyaṉ periyaperumāḷaāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku komaṭattu nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉum Ivan tampi vaiyinateya paṭṭaṉum
Ivviruvom Ivaykku viṟṟukkuṭutta Iva ttukkum puṉceykku mulyamāṉa paṇam Irupatu Ippaṇam Irupatum koṇṭu paṇam koṇṭa paricāvatu Uḻuntaṉ kuṭiyil Irukka Uṇṭāṉa Akattilc coṟṟukku taṉta paṇam pattum piṉpu Akarattil vetāntikaḷ vācalil tanta paṇam pattum Ākap paṇam Irupatume vilaiyāvatākavum Itu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai Āvatākavum Ippaṭi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Ippuṉceyum viḷaiṉilamum Ivarkku dāṉā(ya)dhamaṉaRead dhaṉmavikrayaṅkaḷukkurittāvatākavum Ippaṭi samvadittu
viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ periyaperumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku Iṉnārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum vaiyinateyapaṭṭaṉum Ivviruvom Ippaṭikku komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Ivaṉ tampi vainateyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Isādhanam Eḻutineṉ Ivar makaṉ śrīvāsudevaśarmmaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irā kuṟippu śrīvāsudevapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuṟukoṭṭi Eṟu tiruvuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coṭṭai śrīvāsudevapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kārampic ceṭṭu mātavapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ivvakarap pirāmaṇar per muppat tiruvarkkuk kuṭuttamaiykku
Ivaiy kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
